text:
NAME: — 

LONG NAME: HCID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: HCIdea™ Prescriber Database 

VALUES: Null, or any positive or negative number 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2014; beginning with 2014 Part D Prescriber Characteristics file, the NPI is 
used in place of the CCW_PRSCRBR_ID. 

The HCID was historically used to assign the CCW-assigned prescriber identifier (CCW_PRSCRBR_ID). 
CCW purchased the HCIdea™ Prescriber Database to enable us to roll-up various IDs in the Part D
